legalStructure: Maple protocol lending pool structure where lenders supply USDC and receive mUSDC pool tokens representing exposure to borrower credit and pool liquidity.
targetInvestors: Institutional / qualified lenders subject to Maple onboarding and pool-specific eligibility rules

classification.classificationNote: Maple mUSDC is treated as exposure to an institutional credit/lending pool, not as a Treasury fund share or direct reserve-backed token. It should be graded with the credit_pool profile where pool composition, borrower/originator evidence, collateral, liquidity terms, and risk data matter more than generic reserve custody fields.

metadata.legacySeedNotes: api/prisma/seed.ts previously defines maple-usdc as Maple USDC Pool with symbol mUSDC, Credit category, and Ethereum contract 0x36d8c79B4c18D3b39d9aA27C7Fde5f04CeBc9D7.
dataGaps: Fresh official pool-level legal documents not yet mapped.
Pool delegate and borrower roster need current verification.
Minimum investment requires fresh verification from Maple app or docs.

_meta.notes: Updated to the Nexus RWA classification standard. Removed Cash Management Pool / MPLcashUSDC legal structure. Needs fresh source discovery for the exact Maple USDC Pool variant.
